events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes sagging flex duct exceeding ½ inch per foot between supports, which violates SMACNA and IMC 603 requirements. Work is rough-complete, 70% complete until defects corrected. This is a defect requiring rework. Decision should be fail since it's non-compliant.
